item.description:
Audia 0.2.1

This update focuses on compact menubar usability, more reliable browser tab detection, and smoother day‑to‑day controls.

Compact Menubar

  • Added quick “remove app” action for a cleaner compact workflow.
  • Improved compact menu behavior for faster access and fewer clicks.
  • Additional UI polish and consistency tweaks in compact layouts.

Browser Tabs and Media Detection

  • More reliable browser tab detection with improved responsiveness.
  • Better handling of non‑standard browser behaviors (including Comet).
  • Reduced UI stalls during browser tab scanning and refresh.

Media and Now Playing

  • Improved media probing with clearer naming and fewer false alerts.
  • Better preferred‑player handling in settings for a more predictable experience.

Settings and UI Refinements

  • Cleaner presentation of status information for clearer focus on controls.
  • Small visual updates for consistency and legibility.

Stability and Performance

  • Multiple fixes targeting UI responsiveness and interaction smoothness.
  • General reliability improvements across daily use paths.
